review_title: Best Solution For SME Data Protection
description: Overall security is good. The most important feature is user can login with his credentials from the specified PC only.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1 Centralized unit for data storage, protection and policies implementation. 2 Duel profile enables separation of person and official data access.
cons: 1 Support on Sunday's not available. 2 At least one visit in 3 months required from company side to ensure that operation of black box is smooth and user has no difficulty.

review_title: Best DLP plus data centralization solution for SME
description: 1-Value for money 2- Meets our business objectives for data loss prevention and data backup 3- Made in India product meets global standards
author: Rajesh D.
pros: We are using Blackbox for storage, data loss prevention and email management it has been very helpful protecting our confidential customer data and ensuring only authorized person have access to it. The audit trail also helps us understand if someone has deleted the data.
cons: Their standard support hours are from 10AM to 6PM on week days barring Sundays and public holidays. You have to upgrade the support contract to get 24/7 support.

review_title: BlackBox helps keep all our data secure and sorted and organized with autocratic Centralization

pros: Dual profile feature enable, isolate, personal and enterprise data is very useful to prevent data leakage , black box duo support this feature.
cons: difficulty to connect to same service engineer, call gets disconnected.

review_title: Single hardware single software for multiple IT function
description: Feature of autocratic centralization and back up reporting and auditing are excellent feature, we are no longer dependent on end user remembering to save the data on to a central drive, the minute they save the data it is saved in the central location only. A must use feature for all SMEs where we have so little time and so much to do and if data gets deleted it’s a huge hassle. I highly recommend it.

review_title: Good products for IT management of Small Office
description: Overall we are happy with services of Blackbox and we recommend the same for small offices. However a years back we have faced a situation where our hard drive was corrupted and it took almost 4-5 days to get it replaced and we had left with no data in our hand.
author: Pratik R.
pros: Force centralization, users restriction and Data retrieval after deletion & Internet policy to restrict WhatsApp, Restricted access to Pen drives.
cons: Sometimes customers support is very slow, Backend Software is not user friendly. Yearly one physical training secession for deletion of BPO data, recycle bins is required from your end as backend software is not very user-friendly.

review_title: One box with many solutions !
description: Good after successful installation! Installation period and the process is cumbersome.

pros: Its good & useful product. Data recovery and data protection tool is useful.
cons: Call centre works only 6 days --- 10am to 6 pm. It should be all days in week & minimum 12 hours . Our weekly off is Thursday. This is most inconvenient. Call centre person communication is not good as personal interaction with service technician.

review_title: Good Solution foe SME

review_title: BLACKbox is the most practical IT in a Box product
description: It has streamlined IT in my enterprise. In past 10 years we have not lost any data. We have successfully got through the vendor empanelment requirements of our customers related to cybersecurity. It is easy to manage and saves significant cost on hardware, software and bandwidth.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: BLACKbox is a single hardware single software product to manage IT, protect data from loss, leakage and theft. It helps successfully complete the vendor empanelment requirements by our large customers on Cybersecurity. It has have significant cost on Microsoft licensing as it acts as a domain controller, storage, firewall, end point controller, backup system, device hardening, VPN server.
cons: In their basic level of the support contract Turn Around Time is 2 hours.
